positive: A perfectly symmetrical, highly intricate celestial mandala pattern centered on a deep midnight blue background. The main elements include stylized constellations, geometricized planets, glowing crescent moons, and sweeping cosmic dust rendered in gold foil, cyan, and vibrant indigo. The design must feature clean, distinct silhouettes with strong black outlines, reminiscent of detailed engraving or vector art. The overall aesthetic should be balanced and meditative, using pointillism and sharp linework to give it a high-end, luxurious, yet bold graphic print feel. Overhead studio lighting, maximum contrast, perfect composition for centered apparel printing.
